### Performance enhancers in sports—good or bad? On one hand, they level the playing field for naturally gifted athletes facing doping competitors. On the other, it disrupts sport's spirit. Opinions seem divided.Thoughts?
Competition needs to stand on its own merits without outside help. Natural skill is what makes sports special. Adding enhancers messes things up.

Agreed. Natural talent shines the brightest in sports. No shortcuts please. Keep it fair for everyone.
